query:
SELECT 
  p.id as projekt_id,
  p.title as projekt_titel,
  p.project_number,
  c.company as kunde,
  s.company as lieferant,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cad_files cf WHERE cf.project_id = p.id) as cad_dateien,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cad_files cf WHERE cf.project_id = p.id AND cf.drive_synced = 1) as cad_synced,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_documents pd WHERE pd.project_id = p.id) as dokumente,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_documents pd WHERE pd.project_id = p.id AND pd.drive_synced = 1) as docs_synced
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN customers c ON p.customer_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON p.supplier_id = s.id
ORDER BY p.id;

SELECT 
  p.id as projekt_id,
  p.title as projekt_titel,
  p.project_number,
  c.company as kunde,
  s.company as lieferant,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cad_files cf WHERE cf.project_id = p.id) as cad_dateien,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cad_files cf WHERE cf.project_id = p.id AND cf.drive_synced = 1) as cad_synced,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_documents pd WHERE pd.project_id = p.id) as dokumente,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_documents pd WHERE pd.project_id = p.id AND pd.drive_synced = 1) as docs_synced
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN customers c ON p.customer_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON p.supplier_id = s.id
ORDER BY p.id;
